privileged_info_summary: The task is to create a professional tri-fold brochure in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The output file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/wellness_expo_brochure.odt. The document must use landscape orientation with 3-column layout. Content includes 'Spring 2026 Wellness Expo', 'Mercy General Health System', 'Healthy Cooking Demonstration', and 'outreach@mercygeneral.org'. The task requires exactly 2 images (wellness_logo.png and photo_activity.jpg) to be inserted. All task data is synthetically generated: content text is created programmatically in setup_task.sh, and images are generated using ImageMagick commands rather than from external sources. The verifier checks these requirements by analyzing the ODT file structure (checking styles.xml for orientation/columns and counting images in the Pictures/ directory).
